theme: The Intake Desk — Agent-Native Project Interview

shots.title: Interview state machine refactor
hazards: rough: initial design had submitAnswer calling nextQuestion() internally, causing double-advance in while loops — caught and fixed before commit

shots.title: Pi extension slope_interview tool
hazards: rough: Pi has no native multiselect — adapted platforms step to comma-separated input
rough: cross-package imports required tsconfig path mapping in pi-extension

yardage_book_updates: Auto-create sprint-state.json with phase=planning after interview
bunker_locations: State machine design: separate nextQuestion() from submitAnswer() to avoid double-advance
Pi multiselect gap: use text input with comma-separated values
Cross-package imports: use tsconfig paths mapping for monorepo packages
course_management_notes: S71-1 (long_iron) was the foundation ticket — state machine design determined the shape of S71-2 and S71-3
No breaking changes: interactive-init.ts refactored to use state machine but preserves exact UX
CLI --agent JSON mode enables any harness to drive the interview via subprocess
Pi tool uses native ctx.ui dialogs for seamless agent experience
